summary: Video set to music with no spoken transcript. A 'BUSTED & BOOTED' chrome logo recurs over an animated grey U.S. map that zooms and drops location pins from state to state. Each card names a foreign national arrested in an immigration or fraud case: a Brazilian national for selling fake Social Security cards and green cards in Boston, an Uzbek national for marriage fraud in Tampa, a card over Ohio, a Rwandan genocide criminal in New York, and a former Haitian mayor convicted of visa fraud in Boston. A DHS seal and 'U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services' lockup appear throughout.

script.scene: 'BUSTED & BOOTED' chrome logo (red and blue, gradient glow) over a dark grey map of the U.S. Northeast lit red to blue; a red pin drops on Massachusetts. Card reads 'Boston, MA: Brazilian National Arrested for Selling Fake Social Security Cards & Green Cards.' DHS seal and 'U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services' lockup at bottom.
Map slides and zooms to the Southeast, pin drops on Florida. 'BUSTED & BOOTED' logo upper-center. Card: 'Tampa, FL: Uzbek National Arrested for Marriage Fraud.' Same DHS/USCIS branding.
Map pans to the Midwest; Ohio highlighted in red. 'BUSTED & BOOTED' logo center. DHS seal centered low.

Map of the Northeast, New York highlighted red. Dark trapezoid card in italic serif: 'New York: Rwandan Genocide Criminal Arrested for Lying on Green Card & Citizenship Applications.' DHS/USCIS lockup.

Map returns to Massachusetts, pin on the coast. Card: 'Boston, MA: Former Haitian Mayor Convicted on Three Counts of Visa Fraud for Lying about his Involvement in Political Killings.' 'BUSTED & BOOTED' logo and DHS/USCIS branding throughout.

notable_text: Boston, MA: Brazilian National Arrested for Selling Fake Social Security Cards & Green Cards
Tampa, FL: Uzbek National Arrested for Marriage Fraud
New York: Rwandan Genocide Criminal Arrested for Lying on Green Card & Citizenship Applications
Boston, MA: Former Haitian Mayor Convicted on Three Counts of Visa Fraud for Lying about his Involvement in Political Killings
